history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A split image shows a close-up portrait of a young woman with her hair in a messy bun and bangs. She is wearing large, tortoiseshell-patterned glasses with a decorative bow on the side of the left lens. Her head is tilted slightly, and her right hand is resting on her cheek, with her fingers gently touching her face. She has light makeup on, with glossy lips and rosy cheeks. Her expression is soft and a little playful. The background is blurred, but appears to be a room with a closet or sliding door on the left, and possibly some plush toys or pillows on the right. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a warm and slightly dreamy atmosphere. The color palette consists of muted browns, pinks, and pastels. The overall mood is intimate, cute, and slightly vintage. The top and bottom images are nearly identical, with slight variations in framing or expression. The top right and bottom right corners of each image show a battery icon indicating "82%". The style is reminiscent of a soft-focus selfie or a candid shot.
